## Checklist
- [ ] I opened this PR against `main` (canonical deploy branch)
- [ ] Validation workflow passed (CI checks: required files present, `sw.js` sanity)
- [ ] I did not add large raw files to the repo; large files were added to `archive/` or external storage
- [ ] If `sw.js` was changed, I confirmed precache entries reference present files
- [ ] Documentation updated (README/CLOUDFLARE_DEPLOY.md/CONTRIBUTING.md) if needed

If this change affects deployment urgently, mention it here and tag a maintainer.
